2604.13780.title: Soft $Q(λ)$: A multi-step off-policy method for entropy regularised reinforcement learning using eligibility traces
2604.13780.paper_summary: Soft Q-learning has emerged as a versatile model-free method for entropy-regularised reinforcement learning, optimising for returns augmented with a penalty on the divergence from a reference policy. Despite its success, the multi-step extensions of soft Q-learning remain relatively unexplored and limited to on-policy action sampling under the Boltzmann policy. In this brief research note, we first present a formal $n$-step formulation for soft Q-learning and then extend this framework to the fully off-policy case by introducing a novel Soft Tree Backup operator. Finally, we unify these developments into Soft $Q(λ)$, an elegant online, off-policy, eligibility trace framework that allows for efficient credit assignment under arbitrary behaviour policies. Our derivations propose a model-free method for learning entropy-regularised value functions that can be utilised in future empirical experiments.
2604.13780.paper_summary_zh: 軟 Q 學習已成為一種多功能的無模型方法，用於熵正則化的強化學習，優化回報並附加對參考策略的偏差懲罰。儘管它取得了成功，軟 Q 學習的多步擴展仍然相對未被探索，並且僅限於在玻爾茲曼策略下的在策略行動採樣。在這篇簡短的研究筆記中，我們首先提出了軟 Q 學習的正式 $n$ 步公式，然後通過引入一種新穎的軟樹備份運算子將此框架擴展到完全的離策略情況。最後，我們將這些發展統一為軟 $Q(λ)$，這是一個優雅的在線、離策略的資格跡框架，允許在任意行為策略下進行高效的信貸分配。我們的推導提出了一種無模型的方法，用於學習熵正則化的價值函數，這可以在未來的實證實驗中使用。
2604.13780.author: Pranav Mahajan et.al.
